from manim import *
import numpy as np

class SurfacePlot3D(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        axes = ThreeDAxes(
            x_range=[-3, 3, 1],
            y_range=[-3, 3, 1],
            z_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 1],
            x_length=6,
            y_length=6,
            z_length=6,
        )
        self.add(axes)

        def parametric_surface(u, v):
            x = u
            y = v
            z = np.sin(x) * np.cos(y)
            return np.array([x, y, z])

        surface = ParametricSurface(
            parametric_surface,
            u_range=[-3, 3],
            v_range=[-3, 3],
            resolution=20,
            color=BLUE,
        )
        self.add(surface)

        self.camera.frame.rotate(75 * DEGREES, about_point=ORIGIN)
        self.camera.frame.rotate(30 * DEGREES, about_point=ORIGIN)
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.05)

        self.wait(10)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
